description_long: This object is a black flag mounted on a slender, vertical pole, featuring a prominent white skull and crossbones design, commonly known as the Jolly Roger. The flag is rectangular and appears to be made of fabric, with the pole likely constructed from metal or plastic. The pole has a rounded finial at the top and a simple, smooth shaft. The flag is attached along one edge to the pole, with the rest of the fabric hanging freely. The graphic on the flag is bold and easily recognizable, with the skull centered above two crossed swords. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A black flag with a white skull and crossbones design is mounted on a slender, vertical pole. The flag is rectangular and appears new and well-kept.
description_view_0: The front of the flag is visible, showing the full skull and crossbones graphic on a black background, attached to a vertical pole.
description_view_1: The flag is edge-on and not visible, only the thin vertical pole is seen from the side.
description_view_2: The back of the flag is visible, mirroring the front with the skull and crossbones graphic, attached to the pole.
description_view_3: The flag is again edge-on, with only the thin vertical pole visible from the opposite side.
attribute_graphic_design: The flag features a bold white skull and crossbones (Jolly Roger) centered on a solid black background. The design is simple, iconic, and highly visible.
